subcodes.first_line: O joyous imbiber of the celestial wine! This is the time of wisdom and spiritual fervor; incline thine ear to the realms above, that thou mayest hear the melody [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوش دم نوشانوش باده هوش است و هنگام جوش و خروش گوش بعالم بالا ده تا سرود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
